hyperedges.description: Multiple AI models benchmarked with Agency Agents for coding tasks (voxel gun simulator): Opus 4.6 completed in 23min at $0.34, GLM-5 in 12min at $0.033, GPT 5.4 Pro failed after 30min, GPT 5.4 Mini completed in 1min but incomplete, Gemini 3.1 Pro achieved good results via tool optimization
hyperedges.source_file: docs/20260401-KiloClaw-Opus4.6-AgencyAgents-AIコーディングベンチマーク-JunSuzuki.html

hyperedges.description: DeepSeek runs different models for API and Web: API uses larger base model (possibly V4/V3.3) while Web uses V3.2. API version shows superior coding capability. Kilo CLI can test API version via OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

A2A Protocol promoted by Google, Linux Foundation, and 150+ partners as agent-to-agent communication standard. A2A-Kit simplifies implementation to 3 lines of code, supports FastAPI server, LangGraph integration, PostgreSQL storage, and Redis broker for production deployment.
hyperedges.source_file: docs/20260413-A2AKit-エージェント間通信-プロトコル-PostgreSQL-Redis-チュートリアル.html
